news.title: Vietnam's remarkable journey of voluntary blood donation
news.content: This is a journey of sharing love, compassion, and solidarity among millions of Vietnamese hearts, bringing life and happiness to countless families of patients.

news.title: Regular blood donations ensure sufficient supplies for emergency treatment
news.content: For some, blood donation has become a beautiful lifestyle, including Tran Thi Mai from Long Bien District in Ha Noi, who has donated blood more than 20 times since 2018.

news.title: Experts call on community to keep donating blood
news.content: Health experts have called on the community to maintain blood donation activities to ensure blood sources for emergency aid and treatment at hospitals.

news.title: NA leader calls for long-term strategy on voluntary blood donation
news.content: National Assembly (NA) Chairman Tran Thanh Man emphasised the need for the development of a long-term strategy for voluntary blood donation, ensuring a stable and sustainable blood supply.

news.title: The health sector calls on people to donate blood
news.content: The health sector is calling people to donate blood to address the severe blood shortage, which is critical for emergency needs and patient treatment at hospitals.

news.title: Hanoi hospitals receive early morning deliveries from blood bank
news.content: Efforts to improve logistics include initiatives like dawn deliveries from blood banks in Hanoi to ensure hospitals receive supplies promptly.

news.title: Record-breaking blood donors tell their stories
news.content: For some regular blood donors, it's a journey of persistent determination and pride in order to live a meaningful life.

news.title: Firm uses AR technology to promote blood donation
news.content: Corporations have integrated blood donation into their corporate social responsibility efforts, incorporating new technologies to promote donation drives.

news.title: Voluntary blood donation campaign Red Journey underway
news.content: The annual national blood donation campaign has successfully expanded to dozens of provinces and cities, helping address clinical blood needs.

news.title: Healthy Living: What to eat before and after donating blood
news.content: Important dietary guidelines for donors include maintaining a healthy, iron-rich diet, staying hydrated, and avoiding fatty foods before donating.

news.title: Red Spring Festival aims to collect over 8,000 blood units
news.content: Organizers call on Capital youth and families to join the largest voluntary campaign to ensure emergency reserves during peak periods.

news.title: Capital's outstanding young faces honoured for donor contributions
news.content: Dedicated individuals are honoured for their milestone contributions, including volunteers who have donated blood and platelets over 100 times.

news.title: World Blood Donor Day voluntary blood donation campaign launched
news.content: World Blood Donor Day campaign centers on the importance of regular donations to maintain a safe and sustainable blood supply.

news.title: Red Sunday blood donation campaign launched in Hanoi
news.content: The annual Red Sunday blood donation festival launched in Hanoi to coordinate thousands of safe blood units to address peak holiday shortages.

news.title: Rare blood types and platelets demand surges in municipal hospitals
news.content: Hospitals report a significant surge in demand for rare blood types and platelet transfusions, requiring active coordination from voluntary donor groups.
